query: SELECT autouw_currentcarrierpricingid,mgacode,carrier,ratetype,poytdprem,stfees,manualpremium,govclassstate,govstate,ascselectionremoved,ascselectionremovedreason,enteredby,enteredon,enteredon as dl_watermark FROM dbo.autouw_currentcarrierpricing WHERE enteredon > CAST('2026-06-21 23:10:03.143000' AS datetime2)
